name: Document
summary: Represents the contents of one or more loaded files.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox
methods.summary: Returns the bounding box for the entire document.

params.name: ignoreHidden
params.doc: If true, bounding box will not include hidden items, otherwise hidden items will be taken into account.

returns.doc: Bounding box for all items in the document.

methods.name: CreateCommentWithUniqueId
methods.summary: Create a Comment with an Id that is unique within this Document

methods.name: CreateCommentWithUniqueId
methods.signature: Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Comment CreateCommentWithUniqueId(string body, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.CommentStatus status, string author)
methods.summary: Create a Comment with an Id that is unique within this Document

methods.name: ResolveReference
methods.summary: Finds an item specified by the reference within this document.

returns.doc: Null if the item can't be found.

throws.when: reference does not refer to a specific part (documentPartId is empty/null).

methods.name: BeginTransaction
methods.summary: Returns a new Transaction object. This is used to batch together edits. In the future it may support rollback.

params.name: displayName
params.doc: String that may be displayed in the GUI for undoing this transaction.

returns.doc: New Transaction object.

methods.name: GetPointInfo
methods.summary: Returns information relevant to the specified point.

params.name: worldPoint
params.doc: A 3D point in the world

returns.doc: A list of PointInfo objects related to the world point.

methods.name: GenerateImage
methods.signature: System.Drawing.Bitmap GenerateImage(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.ImageGenerationStyle style, int width, int height, bool enableSectioning)
methods.summary: Generates an Image for this Document.

methods.name: GenerateImage
methods.signature: System.Drawing.Bitmap GenerateImage(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.ImageGenerationStyle style, int width, int height, double maxTimeHint, bool enableSectioning)
methods.summary: Generates an Image for this Document.

methods.name: TryAppendFile
methods.summary: Try to append file with files already in document, adding to current contents.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and append file from

returns.doc: false if append fails

methods.name: TryAppendFiles
methods.summary: Try to append files with files already in document, adding to current contents. More efficient than appending each file separately.

params.name: fileNames
params.doc: Paths to append files from

returns.doc: false if append fails

methods.name: TryAppendSheet
methods.summary: Try to append contents of sheet to current active sheet.

params.name: sheet
params.doc: SheetInfo to try and append sheet from

returns.doc: false if append fails

methods.name: TryCloseFileHandles
methods.summary: Try to close all file handles for currently loaded files, completing load for current sheet. File handles may be reopened in future (e.g. when changing the active sheet).

returns.doc: false if load cannot be completed or file handles cannot be closed

methods.name: TryConvertSheet
methods.summary: Try to Convert sheet with sheetId.

params.name: sheetId
params.doc: Id of sheet to try to convert

returns.doc: false if sheet could not be converted

methods.name: TryDescribeAsAggregate
methods.summary: Describes current contents in terms of an JSON AggregateModelDefinition object.

returns.doc: false if current contents cannot be described as an aggregate.

methods.name: TryExportToNwd
methods.summary: Exports contents of document to an NWD file..

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and publish file to

params.name: options
params.doc: Options to export file with

methods.name: TryMergeFile
methods.summary: Try to merge file into document, merging with current contents, ignoring duplicates.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and merge file from

returns.doc: false if merge fails

methods.name: TryMergeFiles
methods.summary: Try to merge files with files already in document, merging with current contents. More efficient than merging each file separately.

params.name: fileNames
params.doc: Paths to merge files from

returns.doc: false if merge fails

methods.name: TryMergeSheet
methods.summary: Try to merge contents of sheet to current active sheet, ignoring duplicates.

params.name: sheet
params.doc: SheetInfo to try and merge sheet from

returns.doc: false if merge fails

methods.name: TryOpenAggregate
methods.summary: Try to load aggregate into document, replacing current contents..

params.name: aggregateJson
params.doc: Aggregate in the form of a JSON AggregateModelDefinition object.

returns.doc: false if load fails

methods.name: TryOpenFile
methods.summary: Try to load file into document, replacing current contents.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and load file from

returns.doc: false if load fails

methods.name: TryPublishFile
methods.signature: bool TryPublishFile(string fileName, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.NwdExportOptions options, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.PublishProperties properties)
methods.summary: Try to publish contents of document to a file.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and publish file to

params.name: properties
params.doc: Publishing properties to publish file with

returns.doc: false if publish fails

methods.name: TryRedo
methods.summary: Tries to redo the last completed transaction and make it available for Undo again.

returns.doc: False if nothing can be redone or there is an active transaction in progress

methods.name: TryRemoveFile
methods.summary: Try to remove the file with the provided index from the document.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of the file to remove from the document

returns.doc: false if the file could not be removed

methods.name: TryRollback
methods.summary: Tries to roll back (undo) the last completed transaction and make it available for Redo.

returns.doc: False if nothing can be undone or there is an active transaction in progress

methods.name: TrySaveFile
methods.summary: Try to save contents of document to a file.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and save file to

returns.doc: false if save fails

methods.name: TrySaveFile
methods.summary: Try to save contents of document to a file using a specific file version.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and save file to

returns.doc: false if save fails

throws.when: fileName does not have .nwd or .nwf extension

methods.name: TrySetActiveSheet
methods.summary: Try to switch to the sheet with Id sheetId.

params.name: sheetId
params.doc: Id of sheet to make active

returns.doc: false if sheet could not be made active

methods.name: TryUndo
methods.summary: Tries to undo the last completed transaction and make it available for Redo.

returns.doc: False if nothing can be undone or there is an active transaction in progress

methods.name: UpdateFiles
methods.summary: Updates loaded files to match files on disk (i.e. if file has been changed since it was first loaded).

returns.doc: true if anything in document was updated

methods.name: DescribeAsAggregate
methods.summary: Describes current contents in terms of an JSON AggregateModelDefinition object.

throws.when: Current contents cannot be described as an aggregate.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns a String that represents the current Object.

returns.doc: A String that represents the current Object.

methods.name: AppendFile
methods.summary: Append file with files already in document, adding to current contents.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and append file from

methods.name: AppendFiles
methods.summary: Append files with files already in document, adding to current contents. More efficient than appending each file separately.

params.name: fileNames
params.doc: Paths to append files from

methods.name: AppendSheet
methods.summary: Append contents of sheet to current active sheet.

params.name: sheet
params.doc: SheetInfo to try and append sheet from

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Delete entire contents of document, returning to default (untitled, empty) state.

methods.name: CloseFileHandles
methods.summary: Closes all file handles for currently loaded files, completing load for current sheet. File handles may be reopened in future (e.g. when changing the active sheet).

methods.name: ConvertSheet
methods.summary: Convert sheet with sheetId.

params.name: sheetId
params.doc: Id of sheet to convert

throws.when: Argument 'sheetId' is not contained in current document.

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

methods.name: EndDisableUndo
methods.summary: Decrements an internal counter that determines if the undo mechanism is disabled. As the count goes from 1 to 0 Undo is re-enabled. Should be used with a matched call to StartDisableUndo.

methods.name: ExportAsDwf
methods.summary: Exports the document as a 'DWF' file.

methods.name: ExportToNwd
methods.summary: Exports contents of document to an NWD file..

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and publish file to

params.name: options
params.doc: Options to export file with

methods.name: MergeFile
methods.summary: Merge file into document, merging with current contents, ignoring duplicates.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and merge file from

methods.name: MergeFiles
methods.summary: Merge files with files already in document, merging with current contents. More efficient than merging each file separately.

params.name: fileNames
params.doc: Paths to merge files from

methods.name: MergeSheet
methods.summary: Merge contents of sheet to current active sheet, ignoring duplicates.

params.name: sheet
params.doc: SheetInfo to try and merge sheet from

methods.name: OpenAggregate
methods.summary: Loads aggregate into document, replacing current contents.

params.name: aggregateJson
params.doc: Aggregate in the form of a JSON AggregateModelDefinition object.

methods.name: OpenFile
methods.summary: Load file into document, replacing current contents.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and load file from

methods.name: PublishFile
methods.signature: void PublishFile(string fileName, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.NwdExportOptions options, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.PublishProperties properties)
methods.summary: Publish contents of document to a file.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and publish file to

params.name: properties
params.doc: Publishing properties to publish file with

methods.name: Redo
methods.summary: Redoes the last completed transaction and makes it available for Undo again.

throws.when: No transaction is available to Redo or there is an active transaction in progress.

methods.name: RemoveFile
methods.summary: Remove the file with the provided index from the document.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of the file to remove from the document

methods.name: Rollback
methods.summary: Rolls back (undoes) the last completed transaction. It will not be available for Redo.

throws.when: No transaction is available to Undo or there is an active transaction in progress.

methods.name: SaveFile
methods.summary: Save contents of document to a file.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and save file to

methods.name: SaveFile
methods.summary: Save contents of document to a file using a specific file version.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: Path to try and save file to

throws.when: fileName does not have .nwd or .nwf extension

methods.name: SetActiveSheet
methods.summary: Switch to the sheet with Id sheetId.

params.name: sheetId
params.doc: Id of sheet to make active

throws.when: Argument 'sheetId' is not contained in current document.

methods.name: SetGraduatedBackground
methods.summary: Sets a graduated background.

methods.name: SetHorizonBackground
methods.signature: void SetHorizonBackground(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Color skyTopColor, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Color skyBottomColor, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Color groundTopColor, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Color groundBottomColor)
methods.summary: Sets a horizon background.

methods.name: SetPlainBackground
methods.summary: Sets a plain background.

methods.name: ShowMatchingItemInSheet
methods.summary: Search for items with same guid in item, if have, make the sheet with sheetId active, and select the matching model items.

params.name: sheetId
params.doc: Id of sheet to search in

params.name: item
params.doc: ModelItem to search with same Guid

throws.when: Argument 'sheetId' is not contained in current document.

methods.name: StartDisableUndo
methods.summary: Increments an internal counter that determines if the undo mechanism is disabled. As the count goes from 0 to 1 Undo is disabled. Should be used with a matched call to EndDisableUndo.

methods.name: Undo
methods.summary: Undoes the last completed transaction and makes it available for Redo.

throws.when: No transaction is available to Undo or there is an active transaction in progress.

properties.name: ActiveSheet
properties.summary: Gets current active sheet

properties.name: ActiveSheetType
properties.summary: Gets current active sheet type

properties.name: ActiveView
properties.summary: Gets a reference to the currently active View

properties.name: Alignments
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentAlignments object containing the Civil Alignment data.

properties.name: CanDescribeAsAggregate
properties.summary: Determines if current contents can described in terms of an JSON AggregateModelDefinition object.

properties.name: Clash
properties.summary: Gets the associated DocumentClash part as discoverable IDocumentClash

properties.name: CurrentComments
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentCurrentComments object containing the current Comments data.

properties.name: CurrentFileName
properties.summary: Current file name. Different from suggested file name in that SuggestedFileName will return a friendly name for a remote file on the basis that it expects you are trying to save locally and will return a "Untitled" name for files that aren't saved yet.

properties.name: CurrentMeasurement
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentCurrentMeasurement object containing the current measurement data.

properties.name: CurrentSearch
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentSearch object containing the current search.

properties.name: CurrentSelection
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentCurrentSelection object containing the current selection.

properties.name: CurrentViewpoint
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentCurrentViewpoint object containing the current Viewpoint data.

properties.name: Database
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentDatabase object containing embedded database.

properties.name: DocumentInfo
properties.summary: Gets DocumentInfoPart

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: File name (or URL) for document. May be null if document is empty or has no associated file name.

properties.name: FileVersion
properties.summary: Current file version for document.

properties.name: FrontRightTopViewUpVector
properties.summary: Returns view direction up vector to look at model from front-right-top direction.

properties.name: FrontRightTopViewVector
properties.summary: Returns view direction to look at model from front-right-top direction.

properties.name: FrontVector
properties.summary: Natural front vector for this model. Will be Zero if no front vector defined.

properties.name: Grids
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentGrids object containing the Grids data.

properties.name: HomeView
properties.summary: The home view for the current document (if one is defined).

properties.name: Hyperlinks
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentHyperlinks object containing document hyperlinks.

properties.name: IsActiveTransaction
properties.summary: Is there a transaction in progress ?

properties.name: IsClear
properties.summary: Is document in its default (untitled, empty) state ?

properties.name: IsDisposed
properties.summary: Has this document been disposed ?

properties.name: IsModified
properties.summary: Returns true if modifications requiring a save have been performed

properties.name: IsUndoDisabled
properties.summary: Gets the disabled state of the Undo mechanism.

properties.name: Models
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentModels object containing the current list of Models.

properties.name: NextRedo
properties.summary: Display name of transaction that will be redone next time Redo() is called.

properties.name: NextUndo
properties.summary: Display name of transaction that will be undone next time Undo() is called.

properties.name: RightVector
properties.summary: Natural right vector for this model. Will be Zero if no right vector defined.

properties.name: SavedViewpoints
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentCurrentViewpoint object containing the current Viewpoint data.

properties.name: SelectionSets
properties.summary: Gets the SelectionSets stored in the document.

properties.name: State
properties.summary: State property of Document.

properties.name: SuggestedFileName
properties.summary: Suggested file name which document could be saved to. Always a valid filename (absolute if file already exists, relative if suggested name for new file).

properties.name: Takeoff
properties.summary: Gets the associated DocumentTakeoff part as discoverable IDocumentTakeoff

properties.name: Timeliner
properties.summary: Gets the associated DocumentTimeliner part as discoverable IDocumentTimeliner

properties.name: Title
properties.summary: Title for document. Suitable for display in window title bar, or similar.

properties.name: Tool
properties.summary: Gets a DocumentTool object containing the active Tool.

properties.name: Units
properties.summary: Units for document. Apply to all geometry, properties, transforms, viewpoints, etc. in the document.

properties.name: UpVector
properties.summary: Natural up vector for this model. Will be Zero if no up vector defined.

properties.name: Views
properties.summary: Gets a ReadOnlyCollection object containing the current list of Views of the Document.

events.name: ActiveSheetChanged
events.summary: Occurs when the ActiveSheet has changed.

events.name: ActiveSheetChanging
events.summary: Occurs when the ActiveSheet is about to change.

events.name: ActiveViewChanged
events.summary: Occurs when the ActiveView has changed

events.name: ActiveViewChanging
events.summary: Occurs when the ActiveView is about to change

events.name: FileNameChanged
events.summary: Occurs when the file name of the Document is changed.

events.name: FileSaved
events.summary: Occurs when the document has been saved into a file

events.name: FileSaving
events.summary: Occurs when the document is about to be saved into a file

events.name: FilesUpdated
events.summary: Occurs when the document has updated files.

events.name: FilesUpdating
events.summary: Occurs when the document is about to update files.

events.name: TransactionBeginning
events.summary: Occurs when a Transaction (multiple batched edits) begins, before any of the edits in the transaction take place.

events.name: TransactionEnded
events.summary: Occurs when a Transaction (multiple batched edits) has ended and all the edits have been completed or rolled back.

events.name: UnitsChanged
events.summary: Occurs when the units of the Document are changed.

events.name: ViewAdded
events.summary: Occurs when a View has been added to the Views collection. Typically soon after the View has been created.

events.name: ViewRemoved
events.summary: Occurs when a View has been removed from the Views collection. Typically shortly before the View is destroyed.
